backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining student management system with types for courses, student profiles, attendance, and test scores; includes authorization mixin and CRUD operations for students, courses, attendance tracking, and test score management with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: student registration, profile management, course enrollment, attendance tracking, and test results tracking, each with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summaries of three admin pages: AdminCoursesPage for course management, AdminAttendancePage for marking attendance, and AdminTestScoresPage for recording test scores.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Cognify application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component defining TanStack Router configuration with routes for student and admin pages, authentication handling via Internet Identity, and conditional rendering of profile setup screen.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon and message for unauthorized users attempting to access admin-only pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with responsive header, navigation menu for student/admin links, authentication button, mobile menu toggle, and footer with branding and social links.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: User profile setup form component prompting new users to enter their name before accessing the application, with centered card layout and GraduationCap icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, student registration, course management, attendance tracking, and test scores with toast notifications for success/error states.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables defining a warm amber/orange education-themed palette for both light and dark modes, including sidebar, success, and warning colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and wraps the app with InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminAttendancePage.t: Admin page for marking student attendance by course with date display, course filtering, and toggle switches for present/absent status (incomplete implementation missing principal ID handling).
frontend/src/pages/AdminCoursesPage.tsx: Admin page for managing courses with table view, add/edit dialogs for course details (id, name, description, class level), and access control verification.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying total students and courses statistics with navigation to management pages. Includes admin access check and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/AdminStudentDetailPag: Detailed student profile page for admins showing attendance percentage, average test scores, enrolled courses, and contact information. Fetches data by student principal ID from route params.
frontend/src/pages/AdminStudentsPage.tsx: Student management page for admins with searchable and filterable table of all students. Supports filtering by class level and searching by name.
frontend/src/pages/AdminTestScoresPage.t: Form page for admins to record test scores for students in specific courses. Contains a known limitation where student principal IDs are not available from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/AttendancePage.tsx: Student attendance tracking page showing overall attendance percentage, present/absent days, and per-course attendance statistics in a table. Requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/CoursesPage.tsx: Displays available courses for the student's class level with enrollment functionality. Shows authentication prompts, loading states, and allows students to enroll in courses they haven't joined yet.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section showcasing Cognify's mission and features. Includes call-to-action buttons for registration/login and highlights key benefits like small batches, concept clarity, and personalized learning.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Student registration form collecting student information (name, class, email, phone) and parent contact details. Includes validation for email and phone number formats before submitting registration.
frontend/src/pages/StudentProfilePage.ts: Displays and allows editing of student profile information including personal details, parent contact, and enrolled courses. Features inline editing with validation and displays course enrollment status.
frontend/src/pages/TestResultsPage.tsx: Shows student's test scores with overall performance statistics and per-course breakdowns. Calculates percentages, displays performance badges, and presents results in a table format with trend indicators.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), shadows, and keyframe animations for UI components.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a student management platform for Cognify coaching institute with features including student registration, course enrollment, attendance tracking, test results, and admin dashboard for classes 6-10.
